title: Houkiper Distortion Pedal - Guitar Pedals TS9 & TS808 Overdrive Guitar Effect Pedal Drive Vintage Overdrive Effect Tuner Pedal Overdrive Pedal, 2 In1 True Bypass Guitar & Bass Accessories

variation_files.prompt: A close-up, angled product shot of the guitar effect pedal placed on a dark, textured fabric surface. The pedal is shown in use, with a black instrument cable plugged into the input jack on the right side and another cable connected to the output jack on the left. A 9V DC power cable is also connected to the bottom left corner. The footswitch is in the engaged position, with a small blue LED illuminated above it, indicating the pedal is active. The lighting is soft and directional, creating subtle reflections on the pedal’s metallic knobs and edges, while the background remains dark and out of focus to emphasize the pedal. The overall composition is natural and realistic, capturing the pedal in a practical, real-world setup.

A product shot of the guitar effect pedal placed on a clean, white marble surface with subtle veining. The pedal is positioned diagonally, angled slightly toward the bottom right of the frame. To the left, a portion of a silver laptop is visible, showing part of the keyboard with black keys and a trackpad, providing a sense of scale. In the upper right background, a clear glass container filled with small white decorative stones adds a minimalist, modern aesthetic. The lighting is bright, soft, and even, creating gentle reflections on the pedal’s surface and the marble. The overall composition is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on the product and its proportions, which are indicated by green measurement lines and text annotations (ignored as per rules)

A product shot of the guitar effect pedal placed diagonally on a white woven mat with a green and white pattern, positioned slightly off-center to the right. The pedal is angled to show its top and right side, with soft, natural lighting highlighting its surface. In the upper right corner, there is a soft-focus arrangement of light pink and pale green flowers with green foliage, adding a decorative, organic touch. The background is a clean, bright white surface with subtle shadows beneath the pedal and mat, creating a gentle sense of depth. The overall composition is clean and aesthetically styled, with a focus on natural textures and soft lighting.
